nodes.name: Zammad Ticket Approved Webhook
nodes.notes: Configure Zammad to POST here when a cert-registration ticket is closed/approved. Payload must include ticket id and state.

nodes.name: Only If Cert-Reg + Approved
nodes.notes: Adjust state value to match your Zammad workflow (e.g. state name for approved).

nodes.name: Get Ticket Articles
nodes.notes: Fetch first article body; parse JSON payload from body (stored by cert-registration-request workflow).

nodes.name: Parse Registration Payload
nodes.notes: Extract JSON from ticket article body (as stored by cert-registration-request).

nodes.name: Create Keycloak User and Assign Role

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ username: $json.uid, email: $json.email, firstName: ($json.cn || $json.uid).split(' ')[0], lastName: ($json.cn || '').split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') || '', enabled: true }) }}

nodes.notes: Get Keycloak admin token first (POST .../realms/master/protocol/openid-connect/token), then create user, reset-password, role-mappings. This node is a placeholder; use a subflow or multiple nodes for full grant logic.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ body: 'Privileges granted for uid=' + $json.uid + ', role=' + ($json.requested_privilege_level || 'viewer') + '. User created in Keycloak; assign role via Admin UI or run sync-identities-to-keycloak.ps1.', internal: true }) }}

main.node: Create Keycloak User and Assign Role
